strategy.name: STRICT12 Adaptive VRBO
strategy.tagline: Vol-regime breakout + basket gate + adaptive top-k
rules: Universe: 12 names listed by 2012 (no BSSR/MBAP/TOBA late listings)
Signal: VRBO — breakout N-day high only if ATR elevated vs median x 1.2
Exit: min hold 12d then 12% trail from peak
Portfolio: adaptive top-k by score (breadth high->1, mid->2, low->3)
Execution model: weights shifted 1 day (no lookahead)
audit_notes: Fee model corrected (0.40% RT portfolio |delta w|)
Holdout 2024+ positive in audit for strict adaptive
Residual survivor bias: no delisted names in local DATA
Boom years 2016/21/22 dominate path — not smooth alpha
